title: starlight.creative.studio.v1 Attachments Schema
description: File attachment declarations for Starlight AI Creative Studio. Caller may optionally provide a reference image for style or composition guidance. Generated assets are always returned as output attachments.

file_roles.description: Optional reference image for style or composition guidance. The Responder uses this as a soft signal — not as direct conditioning input. The image is processed privately and not stored.
First generated creative asset. Always present when quantity >= 1.
Second generated creative asset. Present when quantity >= 2.
Third generated creative asset. Present when quantity >= 3.
Fourth generated creative asset. Present when quantity = 4.
